conclusions.description: Central Library records establish the house's construction, Corbitt's long and hostile tenure, and the unresolved litigation over his burial.
conclusions.fallback_policy: The investigators may retry Central Library research in half-day increments; a failed Library Use roll costs time but does not exhaust the archive.

clues.player_safe_summary: In 1835, a prosperous merchant built the house, immediately fell ill, and sold it to Walter Corbitt, Esquire.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 1835 年，一名富商建起这栋宅子，却立刻病倒，随后将它卖给 Walter Corbitt 律师。

source_refs.grep_anchor: In 1835, a prosperous merchant builds the house

clues.player_safe_summary: In 1852, Corbitt's neighbors sued to force him out because of his strange habits and inauspicious demeanor.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 1852 年，邻居以 Corbitt 行为怪异、举止不祥为由起诉，要求将他逐出这一带。

source_refs.grep_anchor: In 1852, Walter Corbitt is sued by neighbours

clues.player_safe_summary: No outcome of the second lawsuit over Corbitt's requested basement burial is recorded.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 档案中没有记载那场阻止 Corbitt 葬于自宅地下室的第二次诉讼结果。

source_refs.grep_anchor: No outcome to the second lawsuit is recorded

conclusions.description: Walter Corbitt's body was interred in the house basement per his will; his mind still haunts from there.
conclusions.fallback_policy: RECOVER: if all research missed, the chapel journal entry under the ruined cabinet (or the diaries' burial hints) still points below.

clues.player_safe_summary: An 1866 obituary notes a lawsuit to stop Corbitt being buried in his own basement as his will required.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 1866 年的讣告称 Corbitt 仍住在原宅；另一场诉讼正试图阻止依其遗嘱将他葬在自宅地下室。

clues.player_safe_summary: Corbitt's will executor was Pastor Michael Thomas of the Chapel of Contemplation — a church later closed in 1912.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 科比特遗嘱的执行人是沉思教堂的迈克尔·托马斯牧师；这座教堂后来于 1912 年关闭。

clues.delivery: chapel ruins journal (optional side find; also recoverable via records hint)
clues.player_safe_summary: A moldering cult journal records that Walter Corbitt was buried in his basement 'in accordance with his wishes and with the wishes of that one who waits in the dark'.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 一册霉烂的教团日志写道，Walter Corbitt 依照本人以及『那位在黑暗中等待者』的意愿，被葬在自宅地下室。

source_refs.grep_anchor: buried in the basement of his house

clues.delivery: sealed chapel cellar beneath weakened floorboards
clues.player_safe_summary: The sealed chapel cellar contains two skeletons in tattered silk robes beside a cabinet; they may have hidden from the police and died in the fire.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 松软地板下封死的礼拜堂地窖里，柜子旁躺着两具身穿破烂丝袍的骸骨；他们可能躲过警方突袭，却死在火中。

source_refs.grep_anchor: two skeletons dressed in tattered silk robes

clues.delivery: worm-eaten Latin tome beneath the chapel cabinet
clues.player_safe_summary: Beside the cult journal lies a huge, worm-eaten handwritten Latin volume: a damaged copy of the Liber Ivonis dealing with occult matters.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 教团日志旁还有一本巨大的拉丁文手抄本，腐烂虫蛀，许多段落无法辨读；这是一本残损的《Liber Ivonis》，内容涉及神秘学。

source_refs.grep_anchor: a copy of the Liber Ivonis

clues.delivery: breaking into the sealed basement lair
clues.player_safe_summary: Behind the boards lies a wizened, seemingly dead figure on a pallet — saucer eyes, knife-blade nose, a chain at the throat, and a sweet rotten-corn reek.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 木板后的小床上躺着一个干瘪、看似死去的人形：碟子般的眼睛、刀锋似的鼻子，颈上缠着链条，还散发着甜腻的腐玉米臭味。

conclusions.description: The Corbitt House's tragedies are caused by Corbitt's lingering will — not mere bad luck or a conventional ghost story.
conclusions.fallback_policy: RECOVER: upstairs poltergeist phenomena make the haunting undeniable even if research was skipped.

clues.player_safe_summary: An unpublished 1918 feature lists prior tenants ruined by accidents, illness, and suicide; the Macarios fled under mysterious circumstances.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 一篇未刊发的 1918 年专题写道，历任住户接连遭遇事故、疾病与自杀；Macario 一家也在神秘情形下仓促逃离。

clues.player_safe_summary: Dooley says the Macario father went violently mad after an accident, babbling about a haunting form with burning eyes; Mrs. Macario followed him into Roxbury Sanitarium.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 杜利说，马卡里奥家的父亲在一次事故后突然陷入暴烈疯狂，不停念叨一个燃烧着双眼的鬼影；马卡里奥太太随后也住进了罗克斯伯里疗养院。

clues.player_safe_summary: Gabriela describes waking to find 'it' leaning over her; when angry it hurled dishes, and it hated Vittorio most of all.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 加布里埃拉说，她曾醒来发现“它”俯在自己上方；它发怒时会掷出餐具，而它最憎恨维托里奥。

clues.player_safe_summary: In Corbitt's old room a bed can fly of its own accord hard enough to hurl someone through a window — accompanied by a Mythos reek.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 在科比特从前的房间里，床会自行飞起，力道足以把人撞出窗外；与此同时还会出现一股带有神话气息的恶臭。

clues.player_safe_summary: Thumps and scrapes answer from the upper floor when investigators linger — something wants attention upstairs.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 调查员在楼下逗留时，楼上传来沉闷撞击和刮擦声；有什么东西正试图把注意力引向楼上。

conclusions.description: Corbitt preserved his identity with Mythos magic and can animate his corpse; he is not a harmless shade.
conclusions.fallback_policy: RECOVER: confrontation itself reveals animation; diaries supply the occult frame if read.

clues.delivery: boarded cupboard on the ground floor
clues.player_safe_summary: Three bound diaries of W. Corbitt describe occult experiments, an unearthly summoning, and a spell to call forth an Opener of Ways.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 三本装订成册的 W. 科比特日记记述了神秘学实验、非尘世的召唤，以及召来“开路者”的法术。

clues.player_safe_summary: Handout 8 records a secret 1912 raid prompted by affidavits about missing neighborhood children: three policemen and seventeen cult members died; 54 church members were arrested but only eight held; the autopsies lack real detail and a local official appears to have suppressed the story. Pastor Michael Thomas received forty years on five second-degree-murder counts, escaped in 1917, and fled the state.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: Handout 8 记载：1912 年，警方因邻里儿童失踪的宣誓证词秘密突袭沉思礼拜堂，3 名警察与 17 名教团成员死于枪火；54 人被捕但仅 8 人被羁押，尸检报告异常空泛，且有地方要员干预、压下报道。牧师 Michael Thomas 因五项二级谋杀罪被判 40 年，1917 年越狱逃离本州。

source_refs.grep_anchor: The file concerns a secret raid

clues.delivery: fresh white symbol on the ruined chapel wall (Handout 9)
clues.player_safe_summary: A freshly painted white emblem on the ruined wall forms a staring eye from three Y-shapes; standing near it makes the investigators' foreheads prickle until they move away.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 废墟残墙上新刷着白色图案：三个 Y 首尾相接成三角，中央像一只凝视之眼。靠近时，调查员额头会持续刺痒，离开后才停止。

source_refs.grep_anchor: three Y's arranged in a triangle

clues.player_safe_summary: The 'corpse' spends Magic Points, wards its flesh, and strikes — it is an undead sorcerer animating its own body.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 这具“尸体”消耗魔法值保护肉身并发动攻击；它其实是一个操纵自身遗体的不死巫师。

clues.delivery: when Corbitt wills a deed upstairs
clues.player_safe_summary: A horrible smell manifests whenever Corbitt forces a psychic deed — a sure sign this is no parlor haunting.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 每当科比特以意志施展超自然行为，就会出现一股骇人的恶臭；这绝不是什么客厅里的寻常闹鬼把戏。

conclusions.description: Corbitt's own ritual dagger bypasses his spells and can reduce him to ash.
conclusions.fallback_policy: If missed, conventional damage can still grind him down; the dagger is the clean solution.

clues.player_safe_summary: A blood-rusted old dagger with an ornate hilt lies among the basement tools.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 地下室的工具堆中躺着一把沾着暗红锈迹、刀柄华丽的旧匕首。

clues.player_safe_summary: Vittorio points to a bible passage that is not scripture: 'By his own weapon is the devil worsted!'

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 维托里奥指着《圣经》里一段并非经文的话：“魔鬼必败于他自己的武器！”

clues.player_safe_summary: Marks and residue connect the ornate basement dagger to Corbitt's rites.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 纹记和残留物表明，地下室那把华丽匕首与科比特的仪式有关。

clues.player_safe_summary: Struck with his own dagger, Corbitt's wards fail and he turns to ashes and dust.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 被自己的匕首击中后，科比特的防护崩溃，躯体化作灰烬与尘土。

conclusions.description: Knott hired them to clear the house's name; research before entry is wise but not mandatory.
conclusions.fallback_policy: The keys and address are enough to enter; research only deepens survival odds.

clues.player_safe_summary: Knott says the Macario family fled after a frightening breakdown and that the father now remains at Roxbury Sanitarium.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: Knott 说，Macario 一家在一次骇人的精神崩溃后逃离了宅子，父亲如今仍住在 Roxbury 疗养院。

clues.player_safe_summary: Landlord Steven Knott pays $20/day to examine the Corbitt House, understand the Macario tragedy, and restore the property's name.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 房东 Steven Knott 以每天 20 美元的报酬委托调查 Corbitt 宅，弄清 Macario 一家的惨剧，并恢复这处房产的名声。

clues.player_safe_summary: Knott points them toward the Boston Globe, the Central Library / Hall of Records, and other paper trails before they rush the house.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: Knott 建议先从《波士顿环球报》、中央图书馆或档案厅等纸面记录查起，不要急着直奔宅子。

clues.player_safe_summary: Knott hands over the house keys, the address, and $20 cash in advance.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: Knott 交出了宅子的钥匙、地址和 20 美元现金预付款。

clues.player_safe_summary: The Macario family rented in 1918 and left almost immediately under mysterious circumstances; they are now linked to Roxbury Sanitarium.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: Macario 一家于 1918 年租下宅子，却几乎立刻在神秘情形下搬走；如今线索指向 Roxbury 疗养院。

clues.player_safe_summary: Globe files go back no further than a fire in 1878 — earlier Corbitt House mentions are not here.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 《环球报》的档案最早只追溯到 1878 年的一场火灾；更早关于科比特宅的记录并不在这里。

clues.player_safe_summary: The register of churches notes the Chapel of Contemplation closed in 1912.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 教堂登记册记载，沉思教堂于 1912 年关闭。

clues.player_safe_summary: Witnesses speak of a strange man with burning eyes haunting dreams and mad rants alike.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 多名证人都提到一个双眼燃烧的怪人；无论噩梦还是疯癫呓语中，都有他的身影。

clues.player_safe_summary: Dooley can point out where the Chapel of Contemplation stood a few blocks away — now rubble and painted signs.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 杜利能指出几个街区外沉思教堂的旧址；那里如今只剩瓦砾和涂画的标记。

clues.player_safe_summary: The Macario boys had nightmares of a strange man with burning eyes in their former home.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 马卡里奥家的男孩们在旧居时反复梦见一个双眼燃烧的怪人。

clues.player_safe_summary: Unusual quantities of crosses, Virgin images, rosaries and candles litter the Macario rooms — wards against something they feared.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 马卡里奥一家住过的房间里散落着数量异常的十字架、圣母像、念珠和蜡烛；这些东西像是用来抵御他们所惧怕的某种存在。

clues.player_safe_summary: Ground-floor windows are nailed shut from inside; the side door carries three bolts and two locks.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 一楼的窗户从内侧被钉死；侧门装着三道门闩和两把锁。

clues.player_safe_summary: Corbitt can form pools of blood on floor, ceiling, or walls to frighten intruders away from his secret.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 科比特能让血泊出现在地板、天花板或墙壁上，以恐吓闯入者远离他的秘密。

clues.player_safe_summary: The old knife lifts without a hand and drives its point at intruders under an unseen will.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 旧刀在无人触碰时自行升起，在某种看不见的意志驱使下将刀尖刺向闯入者。

clues.player_safe_summary: Closely fitted boards line the basement; a cursory check reveals hollow spaces behind them.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 地下室墙面钉着拼合严密的木板；稍加检查就能发现板后存在空腔。

clues.player_safe_summary: Blows that should bite seem blunted — Corbitt has warded his flesh with spent Magic Points.

zh-Hans.player_safe_summary: 本应造成重创的攻击像被削弱了；科比特消耗魔法值，为自己的肉身施加了防护。
